paper.title: EvoMemBench: Benchmarking Agent Memory from a Self-Evolving Perspective

timing_boundary: The pinned repository commit is dated 2026-07-03, after immutable arXiv v2 was posted on 2026-06-15. Treat the archive as an official post-v2 release snapshot, not as exact paper-time implementation evidence.

verification.metadata: The arXiv API returned immutable 2605.18421v2 with ten authors, primary category cs.CL, and no withdrawal or retraction notice in the summary.
verification.paper_extraction: The local layout-preserving extraction was inspected from the title, byline, abstract, and v2 marker through page 30 and its final efficiency table; it is readable and non-empty.
verification.release_archive: The archive passed a complete ZIP integrity test. Its root README identifies all four scope-by-content cells, benchmark/data locations, reset policy, metric rules, and bundled memory-system adapters. This is acquisition verification only, not a deep release audit.
verification.claim_limit: No claim is made here about benchmark validity, baseline parity, memory-system correctness, self-evolution, transfer, professional capability, production readiness, or reproducibility. Those require the queued deep review.
